flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Mitchell Community College fell 34% between 2006 and 2009 (22.4% → 14.8%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Mitchell Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (53.5% → 60.9%).
